name: Keith Johns
description: Miami-raised singer-songwriter delivering emotionally resonant storytelling — soulful, honest lyrics that shift from joyful to introspective. Beautifully layered indie folk with hints of R&B soul.

name: The Blue Room Quartet
description: A four-piece jazz ensemble bringing standards and originals to the Alton Road room.

name: Eliana Ruiz
description: Miami-based singer-songwriter blending Latin folk with soul.

name: The Alton Road Blues Band
description: Classic electric blues — three-piece, loud in all the right ways.
